title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Q1 Revenue Jumps 9%
text: Canopy Growth reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue jumped 9% year-over-year demonstrating operational improvements and strategic growth initiatives. Revenue growth driven by Canadian cannabis segment improvements and international expansion contributions. Company focused on margin expansion through cost reduction initiatives targeting mid-to-high 30s gross margin range. Gross margin dynamics showed cannabis segment at 28% while Storz & Bickel achieved 38% reflecting operational optimization. Company captured estimated $21 million in annualized cost savings supporting path to profitability. Revenue growth contrasts with previous quarterly declines showing company stabilization and positive momentum. Management guided for continued healthy growth trajectory with emphasis on sustainable profitability rather than top-line growth at expense of margins.
